definitions.text: Tending to ask questions, or to want to explore or investigate; inquisitive; nosy, prying.
examples: Young children are naturally curious about the world and everything in it.

definitions.text: Leading one to ask questions about; somewhat odd, out of the ordinary, or unusual.
examples: The platypus is a curious creature, with fur like a mammal and a beak like a bird.

definitions.text: Containing or pertaining to trivalent curium.
